title: senecio hoggariensis
intro: Senecio hoggariensis, also known as Moroccan knapweed or Hoggara knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, as it contains sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senecio hoggariensis include its potential to protect the liver from damage, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Senecio hoggariensis is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
